pr.title: Return 404 for empty cache lookups
pr.body: Fixes #77. This PR is limited to the cache lookup path and adds pytest coverage for empty cache behavior. Risk analysis: the main regression risk is changing status-code semantics for existing clients, so reviewers should inspect the cache adapter and run pytest tests/cache/test_lookup.py. Agent trace: files read were cache/lookup.py and tests/cache/test_lookup.py; commands run: pytest tests/cache/test_lookup.py. Limitation: no load test was run. Ownership handoff: cache owner will monitor 404 rates after rollout and rollback is reverting the lookup branch.

commits.message: add regression test for empty cache

reviews.body: Evidence is clear; please verify monitoring after rollout.

review_comments.body: The rollback note is useful for handoff.

issue_comments.body: Linked issue confirms empty cache should return 404.

linked_issues.title: Empty cache lookup returns 500
linked_issues.body: Expected behavior is a 404 when no cache entry exists.
